message.content:
@startuml
autonumber
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

rectangle "Client" as Client
rectangle "Server" as Server
rectangle "Other Client" as OtherClient

activate Client
Client -> Server : changeVideoServer
activate Server
Server -> OtherClient : changeVideoClient
Server --> Client : callback
deactivate Server
deactivate Client

@enduml
